title: Black Bolt/Earth-838
content:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Black Bolt {{!}} Earth-838}} {{CharHub|Black Bolt|Black Bolt}} {{AltUniverse|[[Earth-838]]|3=Characters}} {{Character |name = Black Bolt |image = Black Bolt - Earth-838 Infobox.jpg |real name = Blackagar Boltagon{{Ref|DSitMoM}} |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Black Bolt{{Ref|DSitMoM}} |nicknames = Keeper of the [[Terrigen Mist]]s{{Ref|DSitMoM}}}} |species = [[Inhuman]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|ATL}} |gender = Male |DOD = [[2024/Earth-838|November 22, 2024]]{{Ref|DSitMoM}}{{Ref|MSTMCUAOT}} |title = King of the [[Inhumans]] |affiliation = {{Affiliation|IRFE838}}
{{Affiliation|ILL}} |movie = ''[[Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness]]'' |actor = [[Anson Mount]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|Blackagar Boltagon: Keeper of the [[Terrigen Mist]]s. The [[Inhuman]] King.|[[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Baron Mordo]] to [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} King '''Blackagar "Black Bolt" Boltagon''' was the [[Inhuman]] King and a member of the [[Illuminati]]. Alongside his team, Black Bolt helped [[Battle of Titan/Earth-838|kill]] [[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]] on [[Titan]]. However, after the battle, he was tasked with killing [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Doctor Strange]], as the Illuminati deemed him a threat after he caused an [[Incursion]] by using the [[Darkhold]]. In [[2024/Earth-838|2024]], Black Bolt and the Illuminati gathered to judge another universe's [[Doctor Strange]], who had entered their universe, although their proceedings were interrupted by [[Scarlet Witch]], [[dreamwalking]] in her [[Scarlet Witch/Earth-838|alternate self]]'s body. Black Bolt's mouth was removed by Scarlet Witch, causing him to accidentally kill himself by bursting his brain with his own muffled scream. ==Biography== {{MD|Blackagar Boltagon (Earth-838)}} ===Member of the Illuminati=== ====Joining the Illuminati==== Black Bolt was an [[Inhuman]] that went through [[Terrigenesis]], which made his voice an incredible power, as even a single word could destroy almost anything in front of him. Being the King of the Inhumans, Black Bolt was made the keeper of the [[Terrigen Mist]]s, and his status and power soon made him be approached by [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Stephen Strange]] to join the [[Illuminati]], a group of powerful individuals that would make the difficult decisions no one else could.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ====[[Infinity War/Earth-838|Infinity War]]==== [[File:Black Bolt on Titan.png|{{AltFloat}}|Black Bolt prepares to kill Strange]] {{Quote|I'm sorry.|Black Bolt to [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} When [[Thanos/Earth-838 |Thanos]] waged war, the [[Illuminati]] banded together to stop him, except for [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Stephen Strange]], who used the [[Darkhold]] to look for solutions in the [[Multiverse]] by dream walking. Strange's method weren't successful, but he continued dream walking, which destroyed another universe so he confessed himself to the Illuminati. Strange renounced the Darkhold, and the group found the [[Book of Vishanti]], which they used to defeat Thanos. However, Strange still posed a threat, so Black Bolt was tasked with killing him, using his voice to completely obliterate him, saying he was sorry. After reaching to Earth, Black Bolt and the rest of the [[Illuminati]] informed [[Christine Palmer/Earth-838|Christine Palmer]] about the reality of Strange's death, whilst telling the rest of the world the lie that Strange died as a hero, in order to ensure that [[humans]] keep their believes on superheroes.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ====Meeting an Alternate Doctor Strange==== [[File:Black Bolt (Illuminati).jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Black Bolt tells [[Doctor Strange|Strange]] to remain quiet]] {{Quote|Be grateful Black Bolt doesn't engage you in conversation."
"Why? Does he have bad breath?|[[Captain Carter/Earth-838|Captain Carter]] and [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} When a [[Doctor Strange]] from another universe was discovered in their world, he was brought before the [[Illuminati]] so they could decide what to do with him and [[America Chavez]]. As [[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Karl Mordo]] introduced the members, Strange mocked them, including making fun mainly of Black Bolt's name and his helmet. Black Bolt threatened Strange because of his arrogance towards them, and [[Captain Carter/Earth-838|Captain Carter]] made a warning of Black Bolt's power, which Strange ignored. [[File:Black Bolt (Earth-838).png|{{AltFloat}}|Black Bolt looks at [[Doctor Strange]]]] Strange attempted to warn them about [[Scarlet Witch]], but they ignored him, as they were more concerned with him. The rest of the Illuminati proceeded to tell Strange that he was the greatest danger to the [[Multiverse]], explaining how their version of [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Stephen Strange]] was corrupted by the [[Darkhold]] and destroyed another universe, resulting in them having to kill him. Because of this experience, it made them realize that possibly every Strange was capable of such destruction, which was why they had him brought before them.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ====[[Battle at the Illuminati Headquarters|Massacred by Scarlet Witch]]==== [[File:Black Bolt, Captain Marvel & Captain Carter.png|{{AltFloat}}|Black Bolt prepares to stop [[Scarlet Witch]]]] {{Quote|Wanda, Black Bolt can destroy you with one whisper from his mouth."
"What mouth?|[[Mister Fantastic/Earth-838|Mister Fantastic]] and [[Scarlet Witch]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} At that moment, the [[Illuminati Headquarters|facility]] was breached by [[Scarlet Witch]], who destroyed all of their [[Ultron Sentries]], and headed for [[America Chavez]]. Black Bolt, [[Captain Carter/Earth-838|Captain Carter]], [[Mister Fantastic/Earth-838|Mister Fantastic]], and [[Captain Marvel/Earth-838|Captain Marvel]] went to stop her, while [[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Karl Mordo]] and [[Professor X/Earth-838|Professor X]] stayed, agreeing to vote on [[Doctor Strange]] afterwards. [[File:Black Bolt and Peggy Carter.png|{{AltFloat}}|Black Bolt prepares to attack [[Scarlet Witch]]]] Before Scarlet Witch could reach Chavez, the four [[Illuminati]] members managed to block her path. Mister Fantastic told Scarlet Witch to stop, saying she could still walk away from it all, and attempted to sympathize with her, telling her about his children. Scarlet Witch refused to stand down, and made it clear she was going to kill them. [[File:Black Bolt is killed.png|{{AltFloat}}|Black Bolt accidentally kills himself]] Mister Fantastic explained that Black Bolt could destroy her with a whisper from his mouth; in response, Scarlet Witch used her [[Magic#Chaos Magic|chaos magic]] to remove his mouth. When he realized his mouth was gone, Black Bolt began to panic, and tried to omit a sonic scream, only for it to reverberate and blast back into his head, killing him.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Inhuman Physiology''': Black Bolt is an [[Inhuman]] who achieved his genetic potential upon undergoing [[Terrigenesis]], gaining superhuman powers. **'''Sonic Scream''': [[File:Black Bolt vs. Doctor Strange.png|thumb|250px|Black Bolt obliterating [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Doctor Strange]]]] Black Bolt, after achieving his genetic potential, developed the ability to release hypersonically amplified sound waves through his vocal cords. However, he cannot diminish the destructive potential of his voice. He had to use his scream to obliterate [[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Stephen Strange]] after he became too corrupted by the [[Darkhold]]. He later attempted to use this on [[Scarlet Witch]], but this backfired on him when she removed his mouth with her powers, resulting in his accidental grisly demise. ===Abilities=== *'''Bilingualism''': Black Bolt is fluent in his native English, as well as sign language. After undergoing [[Terrigenesis]], he only uses sign language as a way to communicate with others due to his sound wave powers being permanently active, in order to avoid unintentionally hurting or killing someone. ==Equipment== *'''[[Black Bolt's Helmet]]''': Blackagar Boltagon used this helmet while working for the [[Illuminati]]. ==Facilities== *'''[[Illuminati Headquarters]]''': [[File:Peggy Carter and Black Bolt.png|thumb|250px|Black Bolt in the Illuminati Headquarters]] Black Bolt occasionally resided in the facility in [[Central Park]] whenever the [[Illuminati]] comes together for a meeting. When the Illuminati met to discuss the fate of [[Doctor Strange]], he went to the headquarters. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}} {{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Inhuman Royal Family/Earth-838|Inhuman Royal Family]] ===Allies=== *[[Illuminati]] **[[Doctor Strange/Earth-838|Stephen Strange/Doctor Strange]] † - Former Leader and Consensual Victim **[[Professor X/Earth-838|Charles Xavier/Professor X]] † **[[Mister Fantastic/Earth-838|Reed Richards/Mister Fantastic]] † **[[Captain Carter/Earth-838|Peggy Carter/Captain Carter]] † **[[Captain Marvel/Earth-838|Maria Rambeau/Captain Marvel]] † **[[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Karl Mordo/Baron Mordo]] *[[Baxter Foundation]] **[[Christine Palmer/Earth-838|Christine Palmer]] *[[Ultron Sentries]] *[[Fantastic Four/Earth-838|Fantastic Four]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]] † *[[Doctor Strange|Stephen Strange/Doctor Strange]] *[[Scarlet Witch|Wanda Maximoff/Scarlet Witch]] † - Indirect Killer {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *Black Bolt's hand gestures in ''[[Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness]]'' have the same two fingers signature that [[Black Bolt]] uses in ''[[Inhumans (TV series)|Inhumans]]'' when he communicates through his own sign system. ==References== {{Gallery|Black Bolt/Earth-838/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Black Bolt}} *{{WP|Black Bolt}} [[es:Blackagar Boltagon/Earth-838]] [[ru:Чёрный гром/Иллюминаты]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness Characters]] [[Category:Inhumans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Blue Eyes]] [[Category:Royalty]] [[Category:Inhuman Royal Family Members/Earth-838]] [[Category:Illuminati Members]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Black Bolt/Earth-838]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Themselves]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Scarlet Witch]]
